_comment: Anthropic LIST prices, USD per MTok. Fetched 2026-07-20 from platform.claude.com docs. Sonnet 5 is on introductory pricing ($2/$10) through 2026-08-31, then $3/$15 on 2026-09-01 — update then. cache_read = 0.1x input, 5-min cache_write = 1.25x input. routing-report.py reads this over its built-in defaults; the nightly snapshot picks up edits automatically. Personal traffic is on the subscription, so these are a notional value/quota proxy, not cash.
